{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20974_1
|class_id=20974
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20974_2
|fame=33
|art=12
|fth=18
|civ=14
|tech=13
|ss1=All ELMT DMG +7<br>Dragon Minion HARD Stats +0.4%
|ss2=All ELMT DMG +14<br>Dragon Minion HARD Stats +0.8%
|ss3=All ELMT DMG +21<br>Dragon Minion HARD Stats +1.2%
|ss4=All ELMT DMG +21<br>Dragon Minion HARD Stats +1.2%
|ss7=All ELMT DMG +21<br>Dragon Minion HARD Stats +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
